title: Map Feature: Utilities & Types Setup (useDebounce, MarkerData, env vars)
Map Feature: Core Map Component & Geolocation Hook (MapDashboard, useGeolocation)
body:
## Overview

Implements the primary `MapDashboard` client component and the `useGeolocation` hook with a three-step fallback chain: browser geolocation → IP geolocation → Minneapolis default.

## Files to Create

| Action | File | Notes |
|--------|------|-------|
| Create | `components/map/useGeolocation.ts` | `"use client"` geolocation hook with fallback chain |
| Create | `components/map/MapDashboard.tsx` | `"use client"` map shell component |

## Key Implementation Notes

### `components/map/useGeolocation.ts`
- Step 1: `navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition` (timeout 5000ms)
- Step 2 (fallback): `fetch('https://ipapi.co/json/')` → `{ lat: data.latitude, lng: data.longitude }`
- Step 3 (final fallback): `{ lat: 44.9778, lng: -93.2650 }` (Minneapolis)
- Returns `{ center: { lat: number; lng: number }, loading: boolean }`

### `components/map/MapDashboard.tsx`
- `APIProvider apiKey={process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY!}` wrapping everything
- `<Map mapId={process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_MAP_ID} defaultZoom={13} defaultCenter={center}>`
- `onCameraChanged` handler: store `ev.detail.bounds` in state → `useDebounce(bounds, 300)` → on change, fetch `GET /api/markers?sw_lat=...&sw_lng=...&ne_lat=...&ne_lng=...`
- `useState<MarkerData[]>([])` for markers
- `useState<MarkerData | null>(null)` for selected animal
- Renders `<AnimalMarkerClusterer>` and `<AnimalTeaserDrawer>` (stubs acceptable until next subissue)
- Install packages: `npm install @vis.gl/react-google-maps @googlemaps/markerclusterer`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `useGeolocation` correctly falls through all three fallback steps
- [ ] `MapDashboard` renders without crashing with empty markers
- [ ] `onCameraChanged` debounce: only one fetch fires per 300ms burst
- [ ] No hard-coded API keys; reads from `process.env`

## Dependencies
- **Map Feature: Utilities & Types Setup** — requires `useDebounce`, `MarkerData`, `NEXT_PUBLIC_MAP_ID`

title: Map Feature: Animal Marker Clusterer & Teaser Drawer
body:
## Overview Builds the imperative marker clustering layer bridging `@googlemaps/markerclusterer` with React, and the bottom-sheet animal teaser drawer. ## Files to Create | Action | File | Notes | |--------|------|-------| | Create | `components/map/AnimalMarkerClusterer.tsx` | `"use client"` imperative marker clustering | | Create | `components/map/AnimalTeaserDrawer.tsx` | `"use client"` bottom-sheet drawer | ## Key Implementation Notes ### `components/map/AnimalMarkerClusterer.tsx` ```ts interface Props { markers: MarkerData[]; onMarkerClick: (marker: MarkerData) => void; } ``` - `useMap()` + `useRef(null)` + `useRef>(new Map())` - `useEffect([map])` → `clustererRef.current = new MarkerClusterer({ map })` - `useEffect([markers])` → compute added/removed IDs → `clusterer.addMarkers/removeMarkers`; each `AdvancedMarkerElement` has click listener → `onMarkerClick(marker)` - Custom pin: glassmorphism `
` with 32×32 rounded `` + species badge ### `components/map/AnimalTeaserDrawer.tsx` ```ts interface Props { animal: MarkerData | null; onClose: () => void; userPosition: { lat: number; lng: number } | null; } ``` - Fixed bottom drawer, `max-height: 33vh`, `z-index: 1000` - CSS: `transform: translateY(animal ? '0' : '100%')`, `transition: transform 0.3s ease-out` - Full-screen semi-transparent overlay `div` with `onClick={onClose}` - Touch drag-to-dismiss via `useRef` + `addEventListener('touchstart/touchend')`: if ΔY > 60px → `onClose()` - Content: animal image, name, species, relative `lastEncounteredAt`, distance via `calculateDistanceMeters` from `@/services/location/h3` - CTA: `View Full Profile` - Style with `glass-panel` CSS class (see `app/globals.css` L59-L66) ## Acceptance Criteria - [ ] Markers cluster correctly at low zoom levels - [ ] `onMarkerClick` fires with the correct `MarkerData` object - [ ] Drawer hidden when `animal === null`, visible with correct content when set - [ ] Drag-to-dismiss: ΔY > 60px triggers `onClose()` - [ ] Distance calculation uses `calculateDistanceMeters` from `services/location/h3.ts` ## Dependencies - **Map Feature: Utilities & Types Setup** — `MarkerData` - **Map Feature: Core Map Component & Geolocation Hook** — `MapDashboard` integration context

title: Map Feature: Page Wiring & Tests (app/map/page.tsx, barrel exports, component tests)
body:
## Overview

Wires all map components into the Next.js App Router, updates the component barrel, and adds unit/integration tests.

## Files to Create / Modify

| Action | File | Notes |
|--------|------|-------|
| Create | `app/map/page.tsx` | Server component wrapper for `/map` route |
| Modify | `components/index.ts` | Barrel-export new map components |
| Create | `tests/components/MapDashboard.test.tsx` | Unit tests for `MapDashboard` |
| Create | `tests/components/AnimalTeaserDrawer.test.tsx` | Unit tests for `AnimalTeaserDrawer` |

## Key Implementation Notes

### `app/map/page.tsx`
```tsx
import { MapDashboard } from '@/components/map/MapDashboard';
export default function MapPage() { return <MapDashboard />; }
```
Keep as server component — `MapDashboard` is `"use client"` and handles all interactivity.

### `components/index.ts` additions
```ts
export * from './map/MapDashboard';
export * from './map/AnimalMarkerClusterer';
export * from './map/AnimalTeaserDrawer';
```

### `tests/components/MapDashboard.test.tsx`
- `vi.mock('@vis.gl/react-google-maps', () => ({ APIProvider: ..., Map: ..., useMap: ... }))` stubs
- Test: `useGeolocation` falls back to IP geolocation when `navigator.geolocation` unavailable
- Test: falls back to Minneapolis `{ lat: 44.9778, lng: -93.2650 }` when IP geolocation fails
- Test: `onCameraChanged` debounce triggers `fetch` after 300ms delay (`vi.useFakeTimers()`)
- Test: markers state updates on successful fetch response
- Follow `vi.mock` pattern from `tests/api/markers.test.ts` and `tests/setup.ts`

### `tests/components/AnimalTeaserDrawer.test.tsx`
- Test: renders nothing visible when `animal` is `null`
- Test: renders animal name, species, imageUrl when `animal` is provided
- Test: calls `onClose` on overlay click
- Test: calls `onClose` on downward swipe (simulate `touchstart`/`touchend` with ΔY > 60px via `fireEvent`)
- Use `@testing-library/react` `render`, `screen`, `fireEvent` (same pattern as `tests/page.test.tsx`)

### Run full test suite
```bash
npm test
```

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `/map` route renders the full map experience
- [ ] `components/index.ts` exports all three new map components
- [ ] All `MapDashboard` and `AnimalTeaserDrawer` test cases pass
- [ ] `npm test` passes with no regressions
- [ ] No TypeScript errors

## Dependencies
- **Map Feature: Utilities & Types Setup**
- **Map Feature: Core Map Component & Geolocation Hook**
- **Map Feature: Animal Marker Clusterer & Teaser Drawer**
